2605.01749.title: Only Say What You Know: Calibration-Aware Generation for Long-Form Factuality
2605.01749.paper_summary: Large Reasoning Models achieve strong performance on complex tasks but remain prone to hallucinations, particularly in long-form generation where errors compound across reasoning steps. Existing approaches to improving factuality, including abstention and factuality-driven optimization, follow a \emph{coupled exploration-commitment} paradigm, in which intermediate reasoning is unconditionally propagated to the final output, limiting fine-grained control over information selection and integration. In this paper, we propose an \textbf{Exploration-Commitment Decoupling} paradigm that disentangles knowledge exploration from final commitment, enabling models to explore with awareness while answering cautiously. We instantiate the paradigm with \textbf{Calibration-Aware Generation (CAG)}, a framework that equips models with end-to-end, calibration-aware generation capabilities, by augmenting intermediate reasoning with calibrated reliability estimates and prioritizing reliable content in final outputs. Across five long-form factuality benchmarks and multiple model families, CAG improves factuality by up to 13%, while reducing decoding time by up to 37%. Overall, our work highlights decoupling as a principled approach for more reliable long-form generation, offering directions for trustworthy and self-aware generative systems.
2605.01749.paper_summary_zh: 大型推理模型在複雜任務上表現出色，但仍然容易出現幻覺，特別是在長篇生成中，錯誤會在推理步驟中累積。現有的提高事實性的方法，包括不參與和基於事實性的優化，遵循\emph{耦合探索-承諾}範式，其中中間推理無條件地傳播到最終輸出，限制了對信息選擇和整合的細緻控制。在本文中，我們提出了一個\textbf{探索-承諾解耦}範式，將知識探索與最終承諾分離，使模型在回答時能夠有意識地進行探索。 我們用\textbf{校準感知生成（CAG）}來具現化這一範式，這是一個通過增強中間推理與校準的可靠性估計，並在最終輸出中優先考慮可靠內容，為模型提供端到端的校準感知生成能力的框架。在五個長篇事實性基準和多個模型系列中，CAG將事實性提高了最多13%，同時將解碼時間減少了最多37%。總體而言，我們的工作突出了解耦作為更可靠的長篇生成的一種原則性方法，為可信和自我意識的生成系統提供了方向。
2605.01749.author: Wen Luo et.al.
2605.01749.authors: Wen Luo, Guangyue Peng, Liang Wang, Nan Yang, Wei Li, Yuhan Song, Shaohang Wei, Feifan Song, Furu Wei, Houfeng Wang
